examples: Then she went to the king and accused her of being a cannibal.

Mr Griffiths, 40, referred to himself as the Crossbow Cannibal when he appeared before magistrates last month.
When he appeared in court on Friday, Mr Griffiths, of Thornton Road, Bradford, gave his name as "the crossbow cannibal".
